evals.question: A trigger on Opportunity fires for 200 records. The handler does [SELECT Id FROM Account WHERE Id = :opp.AccountId] inside a for loop over Trigger.new. What is the problem and how do you fix it?

An Apex class queries `SELECT Id FROM Case WHERE Status = 'Open'` on an org with 2 million Case records. It throws System.QueryException: Non-selective query against large object type. Why does this happen and how do you fix it?

An Apex trigger is intermittently throwing System.LimitException: Apex CPU time limit exceeded. How do you identify which code section is consuming the most CPU, and what are the synchronous and asynchronous CPU time limits?

A synchronous Apex method loads 5,000 Account records with 40 fields each and then calls JSON.serialize() on the result. It throws System.LimitException: Apex heap size too large. What are the heap limits and how do you reduce memory usage?

An LWC component uses a server-side paginated Apex method with SOQL OFFSET. Users report an error when navigating past page 10 (200 records per page = OFFSET 2000). What is the SOQL OFFSET limit and what is the recommended alternative?

evals.topic: Cross-object formula join impact on query performance
evals.question: Reports and queries against a 3-million-record Opportunity object have become slow since a new formula field was added that references Account.Owner.Manager.Name. Why does this formula field degrade query performance?

evals.topic: Query Plan tool — cost < 1 means index used
evals.question: You are investigating a slow SOQL query on a large Account object in a sandbox. How do you use the Query Plan tool in Developer Console, and how do you interpret the Cost column in the output?

evals.topic: WITH USER_MODE overhead in hot paths
evals.question: A trigger on a high-volume object uses WITH USER_MODE on every SOQL query. A security reviewer says it is correct, but the performance team says it adds overhead. Who is right, and when is WITH USER_MODE inappropriate in performance-critical code?

evals.topic: Trigger bulkification — Trigger.new is a List
evals.question: A developer wrote an Opportunity trigger that only processes Trigger.new[0] because they assumed one record is always saved at a time. A data load of 500 Opportunities via Data Loader only updated the first record. What is the problem?

You are debugging a performance issue using a debug log and the log ends with *** Log exceeded maximum size; some data may be missing ***. The slow SOQL query is not visible in the log. What caused the truncation and how do you avoid it?

evals.topic: Custom index for date fields requires Salesforce support
evals.question: You need to make a query on a custom object filtering by a DateTime field called Processed_Date__c selective. You tried marking the field as External ID but the option is greyed out for Date fields. What are your options?

evals.topic: LWC wire cache and refreshApex after DML
evals.question: An LWC component displays account details using @wire(getAccountDetails). After the user saves an edit using an @AuraEnabled method that calls update, the component still shows the old name. What is the cause and how do you fix it?
